examples: He wore an ill-fitting green corduroy suit.
She described him as wearing brown corduroy pants and a white cotton shirt.
He took a bunch of keys from the pocket of his old corduroy trousers.
Howell went on to make an unlined linen jacket, and then trousers using a robust corduroy.
Otherwise, he looked the way he always did, same chinos, same shiny-elbowed corduroy jacket.
